data.title: Tactica Visualization
data.subtitle: Real-time type analysis from mnemonica data flow

data:
# Live Type Graph

This slide renders the actual tactica output:

```tsx
<TypeFlow
  typeGraph={typeGraph}
  usages={usages}
/>
```

The data comes from `.tactica/typegraph.json` and `.tactica/usages.json`,
generated by `scripts/tactica-build.ts`.

## Key Insight

The slider visualizes ITSELF. The code that runs IS the code that's analyzed.
